metadata.description: A harness for testing, benchmarking, and tuning PostgreSQL extensions in isolation — behavior separated from implementation.

plugins.name: pg-extension-lab
plugins.description: A harness for developing, testing, benchmarking, and tuning a PostgreSQL extension (C/PGXS, Rust/pgrx, GPU, microservice) — validating behavior in an isolated, reproducible environment, separately from the implementation.
